text.title: Junior AI-Overreliance Coaching Guide Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for one coaching review pass on an AI-overrelied PR.

step.name: scan-six-signals
step.action: Walk the diff looking for: mismatched-naming, library-of-the-day, undefended-exception, copy-pasted-prompt-artifact, no-comment-integration, style-mix. List which signals match.

step.name: select-intervention-level
step.action: 0 signals → acknowledge; 1 → ask; >=2 → block; 3+ blocked PRs → escalate.

step.name: draft-delta-comment
step.action: Write comment in delta format: (a) acknowledge correct part, (b) name one signal per question, (c) include 'what would you write without AI?' on one section.
step.decision-gate: If any shaming phrase ('slop', 'just copied'), STOP and rewrite.

step.name: ask-what-without-ai
step.action: Include exactly one question of the form 'walk me through what you'd write without the AI suggestion on lines X-Y'.

step.name: post-and-track
step.action: Post on PR; log signal+intervention in pairing notes; reference next pairing session.
